limitations: This report was generated from deterministic JSON without calling OpenAI.
Intermediate intraday runs are reconstructed only from retained operational-calibration snapshots.

executiveSummary.headline: The model and TEPCO performed similarly.
executiveSummary.summary: 24 comparable hours were available. Model MAE was 537.0 MW, TEPCO MAE was 510.4 MW. WAPE was 1.90% for the model and 1.81% for TEPCO.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: The morning ramp may have been overestimated.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The morning-ramp average bias was positive. Check previous-day lag inertia and business/non-business transition signals.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: A large single-hour miss occurred.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The max-error hour had a large impact on daily metrics. Inspect lag, weather, and calibration metadata for that hour first.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: The model curve may have risen faster than actual demand.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The hour-to-hour model rise exceeded actual movement. Check positive residual propagation and ramp-guard scope.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Peak timing was missed.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The model peak hour differed from the actual peak hour. Review weather deltas and lag shape around the peak.

rootCauseHypotheses.title: Intraday calibration execution history was preserved as snapshots.
rootCauseHypotheses.explanation: The operational-calibration snapshot index retains intermediate runs, so the calibration-layer timeline is easier to trace than with final-run JSON alone.
counterEvidence: The snapshots explain only the 16 retained runs; deleted older runs cannot be reconstructed.
Calibration was actually applied in 16 retained snapshots.

featureRecommendations.suggestion: Review the impact of lag_24h based on the hypothesis: The morning ramp may have been overestimated.
featureRecommendations.expectedEffect: Check whether MAE, WAPE, and RMSE improve together under repeated hour-band and business-type conditions.
featureRecommendations.risk: Overfitting a single-day pattern can cause over-correction in other seasons or day types.
featureRecommendations.validationPlan: Compare WAPE, RMSE, and max error against TEPCO using recent 2-4 week replay and backtests.
